mapper.select:
SELECT i.*, u.name ,p.negative_prompt, p.steps ,p.cfg_scale ,p.base_id,p.lora_id,p.width,p.height from image_post I left join user u on i.user_id = u.id left join lora_load_params p on i.image_id = p.image_id where status = 1
and (i.title like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or i.caption like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
order by i.updated_at desc

SELECT i.*, u.name ,p.negative_prompt, p.steps ,p.cfg_scale ,p.base_id,p.lora_id,p.width,p.height from image_post I left join user u on i.user_id = u.id left join lora_load_params p on i.image_id = p.image_id order by i.updated_at desc

SELECT i.*, u.name ,p.negative_prompt, p.steps ,p.cfg_scale ,p.base_id,p.lora_id,p.width,p.height from image_post i left join user u on i.user_id = u.id left join lora_load_params p on i.image_id = p.image_id where i.status = 1 and i.id not in ( select post_id from image_like where user_id = #{userId} union select post_id from image_collection where user_id = #{userId} union select post_id from image_view where user_id = #{userId} ) order by -- 基于用户历史行为的相似度评分 (select count(*) from image_like l join image_post ip on l.post_id = ip.id join lora_load_params lp on ip.image_id = lp.image_id where l.user_id = #{userId} and (lp.base_id = p.base_id or lp.lora_id = p.lora_id)) * 3 + (select count(*) from image_collection c join image_post ip on c.post_id = ip.id join lora_load_params lp on ip.image_id = lp.image_id where c.user_id = #{userId} and (lp.base_id = p.base_id or lp.lora_id = p.lora_id)) * 2 + (select count(*) from image_view v join image_post ip on v.post_id = ip.id join lora_load_params lp on ip.image_id = lp.image_id where v.user_id = #{userId} and (lp.base_id = p.base_id or lp.lora_id = p.lora_id)) * 1 desc, i.like_count desc, i.comment_count desc, i.view_count desc, i.id desc -- 使用 ID 倒序确保结果稳定不重复
